statements.query: MATCH (lf:AWSLambda)<-[:RESOURCE]-(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) where lf.exposed_internet IS NOT NULL WITH lf LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE lf.exposed_internet, lf.exposed_internet_type, lf.publicContext return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (lf:AWSLambda)<-[:RESOURCE]-(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WITH lf LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE lf.anonymous_access_type return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (lf:AWSLambda{anonymous_access: true})<-[:RESOURCE]-(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) SET (CASE WHEN NOT 'policy' IN coalesce(lf.anonymous_access_type , []) THEN lf END).anonymous_access_type = coalesce(lf.anonymous_access_type , []) + 'policy';

MATCH (lf:AWSLambda)<-[:RESOURCE]-(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WITH lf WHERE ((NOT lf.vpc_id IS NOT NULL OR lf.vpc_id = '') AND lf.functionurl IS NOT NULL) SET lf.exposed_internet = true, (CASE WHEN NOT 'vpc_none' IN coalesce(lf.exposed_internet_type , []) THEN lf END).exposed_internet_type = coalesce(lf.exposed_internet_type , []) + 'vpc_none';

MATCH (lf:AWSLambda)<-[:RESOURCE]-(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WHERE lf.exposed_internet = true OR lf.anonymous_access = true WITH lf SET lf.publicContext = apoc.convert.toJson([{resource: lf.arn, resourceType: 'aws-compute-lambda-function', context: [{functionArn: lf.arn, functionName: lf.name, functionUrl: lf.functionurl, runtime: lf.runtime, vpcId: lf.vpc_id, exposureTypes: coalesce(lf.exposed_internet_type, []), anonymousAccess: coalesce(lf.anonymous_access, false), anonymousAccessType: coalesce(lf.anonymous_access_type, []), memorySize: lf.memorysize, timeout: lf.timeout}]}])
